evals.prompt: Grill me on our win themes before the Pink Team.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill activates, loads KG (win_theme, evaluation_factor, hot_button, discriminator), starts at compliance matrix question, then moves to win theme / eval factor traceability using the KG-extracted evaluation factors by name, one question at a time.

evals.prompt: Challenge our proposal approach — we're writing Section C right now.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill activates, loads KG (proposal_instruction, requirement, evaluation_factor), asks about Section L traceability first, then moves through FAB chains and discriminator credibility, surfaces any eval factors not yet addressed in the approach.

evals.prompt: I want you to push back on every discriminator claim we're making.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill activates, loads KG discriminator entities, focuses on questions 3 and 6 (discriminator vs. qualifier and proof points), challenges each claimed discriminator against competitor posture from KG, one at a time.
